creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
In releng/13.x, UPDATING states that file is for stable/13 users: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/UPDATING?h=releng/13.2
>>  Updating Information for FreeBSD stable/13 users.
(There's also excess whitespace at the beginning of line.)

It was correct before 13.x: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/UPDATING?h=releng/12.4
>> Updating Information for FreeBSD releng/12.4 users.
